typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

appliedUpdates.description: Added Known Issues section to architecture.md documenting firstIntValue() nested dict extraction bug and confidence-to-integer CASE mapping duplication across SQL fragments.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note that CursorConnector has a dual Swift/Python-proxy implementation in normalizeUsageEvent — changes to fallback gating or normalization logic must be applied to both the Swift method and the embedded Python proxyScript() to prevent behavioral divergence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three fix features (m2-fix-cursorconnector-exact-normalization-gates, m2-fix-cursorconnector-reasoning-explicit-gate, m2-fix-cursorconnector-reasoning-token-extraction) all required keeping Python proxy in sync with Swift implementation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit handoff evidence for required procedure steps (required reads, red/green test evidence, and truthful `followedProcedure` values) and treat missing evidence as deviation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Re-run reviews for m2-fix-cursorconnector-exact-normalization-gates and m2-fix-source-identity-and-hermes-fallback-gates found repeated procedure-reporting mismatch patterns while `followedProcedure` remained true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify which validator commands are mandatory per implementation feature handoff versus deferred to scrutiny-validator milestone gates.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-fix-codex-cumulative-vs-delta-precedence review observed required skill-level validator commands were absent from worker handoff while milestone scrutiny later ran full gates.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a test-placement rule that mission-critical regression tests must live under AgentLensTests/Active (or be mirrored there), not only under Parked.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-fix-codex-cumulative-vs-delta-precedence added regression coverage under AgentLensTests/Parked, which is not compiled in the active OpenBurnBarTests bundle.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When changing token canonical precedence/source identity behavior, require auditing both UsageStore and ParserCheckpointStore conflict-upsert code paths in the same feature scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-fix-source-identity-and-hermes-fallback-gates fixed Hermes parser gating but missed ParserCheckpointStore source-identity overwrite at line 305. The fix required a separate feature (m2-fix-parsercheckpoint-usagesource-precedence).
